## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website performance, and ongoing improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site health improved by 4 percentage points in the last week](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [New dashboard created for performance tracking; 6 articles live, 5 staged for review](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Switching content review process to Google Docs for easier feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Implementing visual elements (tables, graphics) to enhance content readability](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Focusing on direct, concise introductions in articles to improve engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)

## Topics

### Website Performance and Content Strategy

  - [Site health improved by 4 percentage points](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [New dashboard shows page views and search terms](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Seasonal trends observed (e.g., Texas franchise tax filing spike)](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [6 articles live, 5 staged for review](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Working through content batches in search volume order](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Implementing additional manual fact-checking to ensure accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Switching from Webflow to Google Docs for easier review and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Mike given designer access in Webflow for potential adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Carrie to update automation for content review notifications](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

### Content Updates and Maintenance

  - [Plan to update content annually, 2 months before relevant filing dates](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Mike to share Google Sheet calendar of known due dates](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Discussing potential automation for content updates based on product changes](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

### Visual Elements in Content

  - [Implementing tables and graphics to enhance readability](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Two examples shared: custom HTML block with tables and internal image workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Exploring options for visualizing complex calculations (e.g., Delaware franchise tax)](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

### Content Refinement

  - [Reducing mentions of venture capital and private equity where irrelevant](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Focusing on creating direct, concise introductions for articles](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Alternating between "qualification" and "registration" based on state terminology](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Including industry-specific information for attractive business states](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to continue refining content based on feedback, especially introductions](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Carrie to implement visual elements in content where appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/Psqz-vz-3vrQr66RBN_dx5r62kN64bah?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
